历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 18215 → 20100 → 22507 → 24172 → 24702, shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 6500 places and an average annual shift of about 1300 places, showing a clear downward trend; the baseline ranking for the Physics Category in 2025 is approximately 24702; the science enrollment plan from 2021 to 2024 was 70 → 70 → 68 → 72, and in 2025 the Physics Category plan increased to 88; in 2026, the Physics Category plan is 90, an increase of 2 students (+2.3%) compared to 2025, a relatively small expansion with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 165th in 2021 to 135th in 2026, with a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the recognition of the university's comprehensive strength; in 2022, the reputation was slightly negative (dormitory conditions under improvement); Douyin popularity ranking is 58th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, short video exposure at an upper-middle level, and moderate application attention; no obvious record of admission gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no A- or above disciplines, so disciplinary advantages are not prominent; the university is characterized by agriculture, medicine, and teacher training, corresponding to the enrollment majors such as Plant Production, Clinical Medicine, and Primary Education. The social popularity of related major categories is stable; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (History Category + Physics Category about 116,000), leading to intensified competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Shihezi City, Xinjiang, which is relatively far from Inner Mongolia, and geographical preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Inner Mongolian candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three key factors of the continuous backward shift in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the Physics Category plan in 2026 (+2 students), and the significant increase in the total number of Inner Mongolian candidates (+32%), the backward effect of expansion on rankings is far less than the intensified competition caused by the increase in candidates; at the same time, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings has a weak positive effect on the university's attractiveness. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 24702, with a predicted ranking of approximately 25089, and a range of 24589–25589.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 石河子大学在内蒙古自治区医学类近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年17133名（计划10人）、2022年19655名（计划16人）、2023年21374名（计划6人）、2024年6635名（计划8 人）、2025年24702名（计划14人）。整体来看，除2024年因数据口径因素出现异常低位外，2021→2022→2023→2025年位次数字持续增大，表明医学类录取竞争逐年加剧。2026年医 学类招生计划为10人，较2025年的14人缩招4人（降幅约28.6%），缩招通常会使位次数字减小（更易录取），但结合近年持续上升的位次趋势，实际降幅有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 石河子大学是国家211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校，位于新疆石河子市。作为新疆地区重要的综合性大学，其医学学科在西北地区具有一定影响力，对内蒙古考 生而言属于性价比较高的医学类选择。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来在全国范围内报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。石河子大学2026年在内蒙古医学类招生专业调整为临床医学、护理学和新增 的口腔医学，去掉了预防医学、基础医学、中医学等专业，专业结构更加聚焦核心医学方向，可能吸引更多高分考生报考。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预测2026年石河子大学在内蒙古自治区医学类最低录取位次约为20667名，波动区间预计在20254名至21080名之间。该预测较2025年位次（ 24702名）有所上升（更易录取），主要反映2026年缩招带来的供需弹性影响，同时考虑了医学热度持续走高的抵消作用。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Shihezi University's medical programs in Inner Mongolia over the past five years are: 2021: 17133 (planned 10), 2022: 19655 (planned 16), 2023: 21374 (planned 6), 2024: 6635 (planned 8), 2025: 24702 (planned 14). Overall, except for 2024 which had an abnormally low ranking due to data caliber factors, the ranking numbers have been increasing from 2021 to 2022 to 2023 to 2025, indicating intensifying competition for medical admissions year by year. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 10, a reduction of 4 from 2025's 14 (a decrease of about 28.6%). A reduction usually makes rankings smaller (easier to admit), but combined with the recent upward trend in rankings, the actual decrease is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is a key national university under the 211 Project and has been selected as a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Shihezi City, Xinjiang. As an important comprehensive university in the Xinjiang region, its medical disciplines have a certain influence in Northwest China, making it a cost-effective choice for medical studies for Inner Mongolia candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs nationwide has been rising, with core programs like clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. In 2026, Shihezi University's medical enrollment programs in Inner Mongolia have been adjusted to clinical medicine, nursing, and newly added stomatology, removing preventive medicine, basic medicine, and traditional Chinese medicine. This more focused program structure may attract more high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Shihezi University's medical programs in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is approximately 20667, with a fluctuation range expected between 20254 and 21080. This prediction is higher (easier to admit) compared to the 2025 ranking (24702), mainly reflecting the impact of enrollment reduction in 2026 on supply-demand elasticity, while also considering the offsetting effect of the continued high popularity of medicine.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine
- Stomatology
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to aim for clinical medicine and stomatology as reach goals, and choose nursing as a safe backup option.
